description: CANONICAL loop policy for the supervised autonomous loop in ix: the single fail-closed source of truth for both the loop edit scope AND the halt markers. state/quality/{domain}/baseline.json MUST reference this file by version via scope_boundary_ref and MUST NOT inline its own scope_boundary. Sibling to agent-blackbox.policy.json (which governs PR risk scoring). The supervised-loop skill must only edit paths matched by allow_edit and must never edit paths matched by protected_paths. Rust source and Cargo manifests are protected; observability state and docs are loop-eligible. Any halt marker below immediately stops the loop.
